How it works

Three steps from idea to delivery.

Send a message on WhatsApp with your file or idea. We'll quote, design and produce — most jobs leave the shop the same day.

Chat on WhatsApp
  1. 01

    Tell us what you need

    Share your design, photo, or just describe it. We'll mock it up.

  2. 02

    Approve & we print

    Once you're happy, we send it to press the same day.

  3. 03

    Pick up or delivery

    Collect at Ofoase Social Center or arrange dispatch.

Let's print something unforgettable.

Visit the shop, give us a call, or message us on WhatsApp. We reply fast.
